children.__template: We’re passionate about building great things on the web. Discover our story, our mission, and the values that drive everything we do.
Our mission is to make the web accessible, powerful, and beautiful for everyone. We believe that great design and thoughtful engineering can transform how people experience the internet.
Since our founding, we’ve helped hundreds of creators, businesses, and organizations share their stories and grow their presence online using the power of WordPress.

It all started in a small office with a big dream: to make publishing on the web effortless and enjoyable. We saw how the right tools could unlock creativity and give anyone — from bloggers to businesses — a powerful voice online.
Today, we’re a growing team of designers, developers, and strategists united by a love for open-source technology and a commitment to our community.
These principles guide our decisions, shape our culture, and define how we show up for our community every single day.
We hold ourselves to a high standard in everything we build. Every detail matters, and we’re committed to craftsmanship that stands the test of time.
Everything we do is inspired by and built for our community. We listen, learn, and grow together with the people who trust us.
We embrace change and stay ahead of the curve. Innovation is not a destination — it’s a mindset we bring to every project and every challenge.
We’d love to hear about your project. Reach out and let’s start a conversation about how we can help.
